target.name: Json.NET (Newtonsoft.Json)
target.note: Only the library source (Src/Newtonsoft.Json/) is indexed — the code an agent would search — not the test project.

how a type's members are inspected to build the contract metadata used when serializing it

turning incoming json back into objects, choosing a constructor and populating members
selecting tokens from a document with a path expression like store book first title
converting an enumeration value to and from its text name during conversion
deep merging the contents of one json object into another
validating a json document against a schema while it is being read
parsing and formatting date and time values in iso 8601 format
resolving a type name string back to the concrete type for polymorphic deserialization
reading the binary bson wire format into json tokens
the naming strategy that lowercases the first character of property names for camel case
converting primitive values between types such as string to number with culture handling
generating a json schema document from a type's structure
